name: SCC_CableCheckRes
title: SCC_CableCheckRes
syntax: void SCC_CableCheckRes ( byte SessionID[], long ResponseCode )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Cable Check Response is received. Further details (EVSEProcessing) that are transmitted in this response can be queried with

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
